name: Med Link
registry_source: Arizona Corporation Commission (ecorp.azcc.gov) - no exact 'Med Link' match found at 8550 N 91st Ave PMB 46 Peoria; address is Peoria Crossings Commerce Park (multi-tenant)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate AZ NEMT). FMCSA SAFER keyword searches for 'MED LINK' and 'MEDLINK' returned no AZ-based matches; MEDLINKS LLC (USDOT 2443791) is in Norman, OK — not a match. Other 'Medlink' Arizona entities (ACC Medlink, Med-Link Transportation Inc in Glendale, MedLink Health Solutions) operate at different addresses. Address 8550 N 91st Ave PMB 46, Peoria AZ 85345 is a multi-tenant commerce park. Likely a small intrastate non-emergency medical/passenger transport using a mailbox suite; AZ Corp Commission lookup recommended by registered agent.

name: Specialty Transport
registry_source: WA Secretary of State / OpenGovWA — no exact 'Specialty Transport' entity at 704 E Pacific Ave Spokane WA 99202; Specialty Transport Solutions LLC (Aberdeen, WA, reg 2021-11-12, RA Linda Higley) is a different company
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate wheelchair/medical transport). FMCSA SAFER 'SPECIALTY TRANSPORT' keyword search returned only Specialty Transport (Vanceburg KY USDOT 2449006) and SPECIALTY TRANSPORT INC (Knoxville TN USDOT 904642, dba A J Metler Hauling and Rigging) — neither is a WA match. Spokane-area Specialty Transport listed as oxygen/wheelchair accessible service at (509) 534-6300 in WA DOH Spokane Transportation Directory. 704 E Pacific Ave matches a long-time Spokane Cab/transportation hub. Operation appears intrastate; would not need USDOT.

name: Caregiver Assist Trnsprtn
registry_source: GA Secretary of State (ecorp.sos.ga.gov) - not directly extractable; NPPES NPI 1528523073 for CAREGIVER ASSIST TRANSPORTATION LLC confirms active LLC
notes: No USDOT (intrastate GA non-emergency medical transport). FMCSA SAFER 'CAREGIVER ASSIST' keyword search returned no matches. Entity is registered as Caregiver Assist Transportation LLC with NPI 1528523073 (taxonomy: Non-emergency Medical Transport). Operating addresses: 1119 Church St SE Suite C, Covington GA 30014 (per about.me) and 950 Eagles Landing Pkwy Suite 631, Stockbridge GA 30281 (per NPPES). Phone (678) 430-9137; website cgatransport.com. Services: wheelchair/non-medical transport to doctor appts, dialysis, airports.

name: P M Transportation
registry_source: GA Secretary of State (ecorp.sos.ga.gov) - P & M Transportation, LLC; also listed in US DOT DBE directory
notes: Likely match: P & M TRANSPORTATION LLC (USDOT 2583586), operating address 1572 Hwy 85 N (#617), Fayetteville GA 30215. FMCSA registry address differs from supplied 105 Commerce Dr #B Fayetteville GA 30214 — Commerce Dr may be an older/secondary location. Operation type: Intrastate Non-Hazmat with private passenger, business, government, and authorized for-hire classifications. 3 power units / 2 drivers. Owner Marcus Jamison. Registered as DBE with US DOT. Annual revenue est. ~$1M. Address mismatch reduces confidence; could be separate similarly-named entity at 105 Commerce Dr.

name: Rapid Transit Inc
registry_source: PA Department of State / PUC docket 1249950 references Rapid Transit Inc; NPPES NPI 1154726016 (Secured Medical Transport - VAN) confirms active provider entity
notes: FMCSA record USDOT 1372498 returns SAFER 'RECORD INACTIVE' for Rapid Transit Inc — likely the historical match for 1952 Riverside Dr Philadelphia PA 19154 entity. SAFER name keyword search now lists Rapid Transit USDOT entries only in ME (2884846), SC (4480387), NC (292912), MT — no active PA carrier. Company is listed as 'Class I Bus Company' / Transportation for the Disabled at (215) 632-4311. Holds PA PUC certification (doc 1249950) and NPI 1154726016 for Secured Medical Transport (VAN) in Philadelphia. Likely active intrastate operator with lapsed/inactivated USDOT registration; may operate primarily under PA PUC authority. Confirm with PA Dept of State business entity search.
